creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I can not reproduce your problem. 
The original distribution is interactive, 
but the patches with the port makes it non interactive. 

Please compare your log with: 
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-8-latest-logs/hylafax-6.0.4_5.log 

Some of your local settings may cause the failback to interactive.
